recommendations.title: Badlapur
recommendations.overview: After his wife and son are killed, a young man finds out the man behind the murder and fights against him, along committing some big mistakes.

recommendations.title: Tremors 3: Back to Perfection
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Survivalist Burt Gummer returns home to Perfection, to find that the little town has been shaken up again by morphing, man-eating Graboids.

recommendations.title: Asuran
recommendations.overview: A family from the underprivileged class is on the run after the teenaged son kills a rich man from the upper caste. Can the pacifist father be able to save his hot-blooded son?

recommendations.title: Pieces of a Woman
recommendations.overview: When a young mother's home birth ends in unfathomable tragedy, she begins a year-long odyssey of mourning that fractures relationships with loved ones in this deeply personal story of a woman learning to live alongside her loss.

recommendations.title: The Neighbors' Window
recommendations.overview: The story of a middle-aged woman with small children whose life is shaken up when two free-spirited twenty-somethings move in across the street.

recommendations.title: Wild Things: Foursome
recommendations.overview: A murdered hotel millionaire's son finds himself tangled up in a game of seduction and murder after a raunchy night with three beautiful women.

recommendations.title: Joyland
recommendations.overview: As a patriarchal family yearns for the birth of a son to continue their family line, their youngest son secretly joins an erotic dance theatre and falls for its transgender starlet.

recommendations.title: My Father and My Son
recommendations.overview: A left-wing journalist whose wife died while giving birth to his son during a military coup returns to his family's farm. Estranged from his father for turning his back on the family and wasting his life with political activism instead, he tries to r

recommendations.title: Little Boy
recommendations.overview: An eight-year-old boy is willing to do whatever it takes to end World War II so he can bring his father home. The story reveals the indescribable love a father has for his little boy and the love a son has for his father.

recommendations.title: Sgt. Stubby: An American Hero
recommendations.overview: The true story of the most decorated dog in American military history - Sgt. Stubby - and the enduring bonds he forged with his brothers-in-arms in the trenches of World War I.
